scripts.build:libs: npm run build:captions && npm run build:kuromoji
scripts.test:subtitles: npm run build && node tests/subtitle-model-tests.mjs && node tests/subtitle-provider-tests.mjs
scripts.test:library: npm run build && node tests/library-presentation-tests.mjs && node tests/library-i18n-tests.mjs && node tests/library-bulk-model-tests.mjs && node tests/library-cover-controller-tests.mjs
scripts.test:player: npm run build && node tests/known-basic-actions-tests.mjs && node tests/runtime-prefetch-tests.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:highlighter && npm run test:subtitles && npm run test:library && npm run test:player && npm run test:python
